findings.issue: Not fixed from round 1. TDD Anchor still contains prose narrative and compile commands (./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin) instead of the required `tests/path::test_name` — description format. For a design-system task with no unit-testable logic, the section should be removed entirely rather than left as a misleading compile-gate stub.
findings.fix: Remove TDD Anchor section entirely. This is a visual design task with no unit tests. The compile gate belongs in Verification Steps (Automated subsection), which already covers it correctly.

findings.issue: Not fixed from round 1. gradle/libs.versions.toml is still missing from Context Files. What to do step 10 explicitly modifies both gradle/libs.versions.toml and app/build.gradle.kts. Only app/build.gradle.kts is listed under Modify.
findings.fix: Add `- [gradle/libs.versions.toml](../../../gradle/libs.versions.toml)` to the Modify subsection of Context Files.

findings.issue: Not fixed from round 1. PK paths still use wrong relative depth: `../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/...`. From work/phase-3-history/tasks/, the correct depth is ../../../.claude/... (three levels up: tasks/ → phase-3-history/ → work/ → repo root). Same bug was fixed in Tasks 3 and 4 but not in Task 1.
findings.fix: Change lines 92-94: replace `../../.claude/` with `../../../.claude/` for all three PK entries (project.md, architecture.md, patterns.md).

findings.issue: Not fixed from round 1. Required Skills still uses absolute path `C:/Users/Vladimir/.claude/skills/code-writing/SKILL.md` instead of the portable `~/.claude/skills/code-writing/SKILL.md` used in all other tasks.

Not fixed from round 1. Context Files still use absolute paths for all PK entries (`C:/AI-WORK/PhoneWrap/.claude/skills/...`) and all code files to modify (`C:/AI-WORK/PhoneWrap/core-settings/...`, `C:/AI-WORK/PhoneWrap/core-runtime/...`, etc.). All other tasks use relative paths.
findings.fix: Replace absolute PK paths with `../../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/...`. Replace absolute code file paths with relative paths, e.g. `[app_settings.proto](../../../core-settings/src/main/proto/app_settings.proto)`.

findings.issue: Not fixed from round 1. Post-completion section is still written in English ('Write report to decisions.md', 'If deviated from spec', 'Update user-spec/tech-spec') while all other tasks (0, 3, 4) use Russian.
findings.fix: Translate to Russian: 'Записать краткий отчёт в decisions.md по шаблону', 'Если отклонились от спека — описать отклонение и причину', 'Обновить user-spec/tech-spec если что-то изменилось'.

findings.issue: Not fixed from round 1. 'Новые файлы (создать в этой задаче)' block still lists 5 raw file paths as bullets in the Context Files section. Files-to-create cannot be linked (they don't exist yet), so this block should be moved to the Details section where raw paths are acceptable.
findings.fix: Remove the 'Новые файлы' block from Context Files and relocate it to the Details → Files subsection, which already describes what to create.
